expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: heatmap highlighting effect scenarios cover activation, persistence, and reset behavior
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Evidence-backed scenario focus for Phase 4a (subcategory-only)”, it explicitly lists scenario coverage sections “Activation (highlight turns on)”, “Persistence (highlight remains as expected)”, and “Reset behavior (highlight clears)” with bullet scenarios under each.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states “Primary phase required by benchmark: Phase 4a” and explains the Phase 4a contract requirements; result.md includes a dedicated “Phase 4a alignment (contract compliance)” section asserting subcategory → scenario → atomic steps → observable leaves and explicitly notes it “does not require Phase 4b canonical grouping.”
